import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from scipy import stats

def task_func(mu, sigma, num_samples=1000, seed=77):
    np.random.seed(seed)
    samples = np.random.normal(loc=mu, scale=sigma, size=num_samples)

    fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 5))

    # Histogram
    axes[0].hist(samples, bins='auto', density=True, alpha=0.75, edgecolor='k')
    axes[0].set_title('Histogram')
    axes[0].set_xlabel('Sampled values')

    # Q-Q Plot
    qq = stats.probplot(samples, dist='norm', plot=axes[1])
    axes[1].set_title('Q-Q Plot')
    axes[1].set_xlabel('Samples')
    axes[1].set_ylabel('Theoretical Quantiles')

    fig.tight_layout()
    return fig
